Senior Talent Acquisition Specialist [ Tech & AI Hiring | Employer Branding | Certified Tech Recruiter]

Hiring: Lead – Gen AI QA Engineer 🚨
 Location: San Francisco, CA (Hybrid – 1 Day Onsite Mandatory)
 Duration: 12+ Months Contract
 Experience: 10+ Years
 Note: Candidates must be local to the Bay Area

Job Summary:
We are looking for an experienced Lead GenAI QA Engineer with strong expertise in AI/ML-driven quality engineering and Agentic AI frameworks. The ideal candidate will lead the development of AI-powered testing solutions, leveraging LLMs, RAG, workflow automation, and MLOps to improve software quality across the SDLC.

Required Skills:
✔ 10+ years in Software Engineering / Quality Engineering
✔ 3+ years of experience implementing AI/ML or Generative AI solutions
✔ Strong knowledge of LLM orchestration, Agentic AI, RAG, Prompt Engineering, Vector Databases
✔ Experience with workflow automation tools (n8n, Nova)
✔ Hands-on experience with RAG implementations or model fine-tuning
✔ Experience integrating MCP servers with LLMs
✔ Strong Python programming skills
✔ Experience with SQL & NoSQL databases
✔ Ability to troubleshoot LLM and workflow-level issues
✔ Knowledge of LLM hallucination mitigation strategies
✔ Experience monitoring GenAI systems (security & privacy)

📩 If you are interested or know someone who is a good fit, please share your resume at:
  shalini@kzsoftsolutions.com
 M: (813) 568-1274 | ☎️ P: (813) 568-1270 x 104

- Hands-on expertise with #Python, #SQL, #PySpark, #Pandas, #NumPy, #scikit-learn
